stories.headline: Student loans inquiry to look at whether system is 'unfair'
stories.description: The Treasury Committee will look at whether "the goalposts [have] been moved in a way which is unfair".

stories.headline: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
stories.description: Agent recruited girls for Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC.

stories.headline: Newspaper headlines: 'Starmer did ignore Epstein warnings' and 'Record oil release'
stories.description: Thursday's papers all lead with files released on Lord Mandelson's vetting for the US ambassador role.

stories.headline: Noma head chef René Redzepi resigns after abuse allegations and protests
stories.description: Noma's chef quit after abuse accusations and protests surfaced.

stories.headline: Hundreds of GPs tell BBC they have never refused a fit note over mental health concerns
stories.description: The number of fit notes issued has been rising, with more than 11.2m approved in England last year.
